title: nazah #5137
definition:
1) to spurt, spatter, sprinkle
    1a) (Qal) to spurt, spatter
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to spurt, sprinkle upon
 2) to spring, leap
    2a) (Hiphil) to cause to leap, startle
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to spurt, spatter, sprinkle
    1a) (Qal) to spurt, spatter
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to spurt, sprinkle upon
 2) to spring, leap
    2a) (Hiphil) to cause to leap, startle

    NASB:  to spurt, spatter, sprinkle
